name: macroforge_ts_syn
description: TypeScript syntax types for compile-time macro code generation

items.name: ToTsExpr
items.signature: pub trait ToTsExpr
items.description:
Converts common Rust values into SWC [`Expr`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Expr) nodes.

This enables ergonomic interpolation in template literals and other AST
construction contexts where a string or identifier should be treated as a
TypeScript expression.

items.name: to_ts_expr
items.signature: pub fn to_ts_expr<T : ToTsExpr>(value : T) -> swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Expr
items.description:
Convert a value into a TypeScript [`Expr`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Expr).

This is a convenience wrapper for [`ToTsExpr`].

items.name: ToTsType
items.signature: pub trait ToTsType
items.description:
Converts common Rust values into SWC [`TsType`](swc_core::ecma::ast::TsType) nodes.

This enables ergonomic interpolation in template literals where a type
annotation is expected.

items.name: to_ts_type
items.signature: pub fn to_ts_type<T : ToTsType>(value : T) -> swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: TsType
items.description:
Convert a value into a TypeScript [`TsType`](swc_core::ecma::ast::TsType).

This is a convenience wrapper for [`ToTsType`].

items.name: ToTsIdent
items.signature: pub trait ToTsIdent
items.description:
Converts common Rust values into SWC [`Ident`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Ident) nodes.

This enables ergonomic interpolation in template literals where an identifier
is expected.

items.name: to_ts_ident
items.signature: pub fn to_ts_ident<T : ToTsIdent>(value : T) -> swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Ident
items.description:
Convert a value into a TypeScript [`Ident`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Ident).

This is a convenience wrapper for [`ToTsIdent`].

items.name: ToTsStmt
items.signature: pub trait ToTsStmt
items.description:
Converts common Rust values into SWC [`Stmt`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Stmt) nodes.

This enables ergonomic interpolation in template literals where a statement
is expected.

items.name: to_ts_stmt
items.signature: pub fn to_ts_stmt<T : ToTsStmt>(value : T) -> swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Stmt
items.description:
Convert a value into a TypeScript [`Stmt`](swc_core::ecma::ast::Stmt).

This is a convenience wrapper for [`ToTsStmt`].

items.name: ToTsTypeName
items.signature: pub trait ToTsTypeName
items.description:
Trait for converting values to type name strings.

This is used for type placeholder substitution in templates.
The key difference from `ToString` is that for `Ident`, this uses
the symbol directly (`.sym`) rather than the Display impl, which
avoids including SyntaxContext markers like `#0`.

items.name: StmtVec
items.signature: pub struct StmtVec
items.description:
A wrapper type for passing a `Vec<Stmt>` to be used inline in function bodies.

This is a marker type that `ts_quote!` can detect and handle specially,
allowing you to interpolate multiple statements where the macro expects them.

items.name: expr_to_string
items.signature: pub fn expr_to_string(expr : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Expr) -> String
items.description:
Converts an expression to its TypeScript string representation.

This is used by the template compiler to convert AST nodes back to strings
for runtime parsing.

items.name: type_to_string
items.signature: pub fn type_to_string(ty : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: TsType) -> String
items.description: Converts a type to its TypeScript string representation.

items.name: ident_to_string
items.signature: pub fn ident_to_string(ident : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Ident) -> String
items.description: Converts an identifier to its TypeScript string representation.

items.name: emit_module_items
items.signature: pub fn emit_module_items(items : & [swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: ModuleItem], comments : & swc_core :: common :: comments :: SingleThreadedComments) -> String
items.description:
Emits a list of module items to a TypeScript source string.

This function takes AST nodes and optional comments, and produces
properly formatted TypeScript source code.

items.name: emit_expr
items.signature: pub fn emit_expr(expr : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Expr) -> String
items.description:
Emits an expression to a string representation.

Used by `ts_template!` when injecting expressions into raw source strings.

items.name: emit_ts_type
items.signature: pub fn emit_ts_type(ty : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: TsType) -> String
items.description:
Emits a TypeScript type to a string representation.

Used by `ts_template!` when injecting types into raw source strings.

items.name: emit_stmt
items.signature: pub fn emit_stmt(stmt : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Stmt) -> String
items.description:
Emits a statement to a string representation.

Used by `ts_template!` when injecting statements into raw source strings.

items.name: ToTsString
items.signature: pub trait ToTsString
items.description:
Trait for converting values to TypeScript string representations.

This trait is used by `ts_template!` macro for interpolating values into
string-based templates. It provides a unified way to convert both standard
Rust types and SWC AST types to their TypeScript string form.

items.name: TsExpr
items.signature: pub struct TsExpr
items.description:
Wrapper for [`swc_core::ecma::ast::Expr`] that implements [`Display`] and [`ToTsString`].

This allows expressions to be interpolated into string-based templates
using `@{expr}` syntax, where the expression will be emitted as TypeScript code.

items.name: TsIdent
items.signature: pub struct TsIdent
items.description:
Wrapper for [`swc_core::ecma::ast::Ident`] that implements [`Display`].

This allows identifiers to be interpolated into string-based templates.
The identifier's symbol (name) is emitted directly.

items.name: TsTypeWrapper
items.signature: pub struct TsTypeWrapper
items.description:
Wrapper for [`swc_core::ecma::ast::TsType`] that implements [`Display`].

This allows TypeScript types to be interpolated into string-based templates.

items.name: TsStmt
items.signature: pub struct TsStmt
items.description:
Wrapper for [`swc_core::ecma::ast::Stmt`] that implements [`Display`].

This allows statements to be interpolated into string-based templates.

items.name: stmt_to_string
items.signature: pub fn stmt_to_string(stmt : & swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Stmt) -> String
items.description: Converts a statement to its TypeScript string representation.

items.name: parse_ts_to_module_items
items.signature: pub fn parse_ts_to_module_items(source : & str) -> Vec < swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: ModuleItem >
items.description:
Parses a TypeScript string into a Vec of ModuleItems.

This is used by the template compiler to parse generated code at runtime.

items.name: extend_module_item_body
items.signature: pub fn extend_module_item_body(item : & mut swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: ModuleItem, stmts : Vec < swc_core :: ecma :: ast :: Stmt >)
items.description:
Extends the body of a function or class with additional statements.

This helper is used by the generated code for virtually-completed chunks.
When a template has control flow inside a function body, the function is
parsed with an empty body and this function extends it with the actual
statements collected at runtime.

params.name: item
params.description: The `ModuleItem` containing a function or class declaration

params.name: stmts
params.description: The statements to add to the function/class body
